name: aaws
description: Natural language interface to AWS with built-in safety tiers. Classify commands by risk level (0-3), execute them safely, format output as readable tables, browse known safety tiers, and verify AWS CLI setup.

tools.name: classify_aws_command
tools.description: Classify an AWS CLI command into a safety risk tier (0-3)

tools.name: execute_aws_command
tools.description: Execute an AWS CLI command via safe subprocess

tools.name: format_aws_output
tools.description: Format JSON output into readable tables or cards

tools.name: execute_confirmed_aws_command
tools.description: Execute a pre-confirmed AWS CLI command after user approval

tools.name: check_aws_environment
tools.description: Verify AWS CLI installation and credential configuration
